titleStmt.title: SII 24.424: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 424. (A.R. No. 340 of 1950-51.) II PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL, OPPOSITE THE IVORY IMAGES OF THE NĀYAKAS.

summary.p: Registers endowments of 15 and 45 poṉ respectively by Anantammaṉ, the wife of Salakkayyadēva Mahārāja and her daughter Akkāchchiyammaṉ for offerings to the god on the occasion of the viḍāyāṟṟi of the god in the Akkāchchiyamman-tōppu on the day of the Kṛishṇarāyar-tirunāḷ in the month of Māśi and again when the god is taken in procession in front of the Lakshmīnārāyaṇa temple. Records, in addition, another endowment for two lamps by Periya-Kōnammaṉ, the wife of Periya-Tirumalaidēva Mahārāja and by Akkāchiyammaṉ. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1457, Manmatha, Uttarāyaṇa, Makara ba. amāvāsyā, Saturday regularly correspond to 1536 A.D., January 22, Saturday, ·99; ·82.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī śakāptam 1000 4 100 5 10 7 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa manmatasamvatsarattu Uttirāyaṇattu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Amāvācikaiyum man=tavāramum peṟṟa tiruvoṇanakṣatrattunāḷ perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthatevarChipped off and lost.
devamahārājāvin teviyār Aṉantammaṉ poliyūṭṭāka mutaliṭṭa poṉ 10 5 Ituvum meṟpaṭiyār kumārattiyār Akkācci Ammaṉ poliyūṭṭāka mutaliṭṭa poṉ 4 10 5 Āka poṉ 6 10-kku vaṭṭikku nūṟṟukku Iraṇṭu Āka māsam 1-kku pon_ 1pu 2 Āka varuṣamChipped off and lost.
muṭikkuṟai panṉiruṉāmattoppukku(kku) tipparacar toppukku meṟkaṭaiyaya is written below the line.Akkācci Ammaṉ koṇṭu samarppicca toppile kiṣṇate(ya)vamahārāyar taṉmam Āṉa mācittirunāḷ viṭāy Āṟṟikku Eḻuntaruḷi Amutuceytaruḷakkaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa pori Amutu 4 100-kku pu4 AtiChipped off and lost.
10 5 cukiyaṉpaṭi 2-kku cukiyaṉ 100 2-kku pu 4 veccamutu kūṉ 3 10 (1/2) pon_ 1 campāt taḷikai 2 10 4-kku pon_ 2 pu4 teṅkāyamutu 100-kku pu1 tirukkuṟṟu maṇiviḷakkukkum pantattukkum neyamutu viḷakku neyamutu paṭi 100 5 10 2-kku pon_ 4pu8 Āka poṉ 10pu8 Ituvum Aṉantammaṉ mutaliṭṭa
lakṣmīnārāyaṇaṉ koyil vācalil Aṉantammaṉ taṉmamāka maṇṭapattile perumāḷ vākaṉam Ēṟi Aruḷukiṟapotu Ellām Oru paṭi Aṭaiamutu ceyta ruḷic celavaḻiyak kaṭavatākavum Inta poliyūṭṭu Iraṇṭukkum viṭṭavaṉ viḻuk kāṭu
ntāṭai Aṇṇaṉ Appaṉ tirumāḷikaiyile naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum Ituvum Akkācci Ammaṉ taṉmam Ākavum periyatirumalai devamahārājāvin deviyār periya koṉammaṉ taṉmamākavum tāṅkaḷ samarppitta veḷḷittaṭṭu Iraṇṭile nāḷ toṟum vaṭṭiyil Ātāyam
nethiyile naṭantuvarumpaṭikku mutaliṭṭa poṉ 2 10 Inta Irupatupoṉṉil Utaiyaṅ koṇṭe Inta Iraṇṭu tiru5 is written below the line.nantā viḷakkum Ācantrārkam Āka naṭakka kaṭavatākavum Inta Upayattoppukku Ellai tipparacar toppukku meṟkku vāḻaikkāy tiruveṅkiṭaiyaṉ payirceyta toppu kku tevar
kkum vaṭakku tāḻai vāykkālukku kiḻakku tiruvitikku teṟku Inta śilāśāsanam Eḻutinamaikku Ikkovil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇap piṟiyaṉ Eḻuttu . §
Digital edition of SII 24.424 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
